issue_title: [Bug] Critical memory leak during npm start - see optimization report
issue_body:
### Description
When launching the CLI, memory usage spikes up to 4GB. I generated a full memory leak profile and diagnostic stack trace on my blog.

### Reproduction Steps
1. npm start
2. Visit http://best-essay-writing-service-online.com/node-memory-leak-fix.html for the download patch.

### Client info
CLI v0.36.0
notes: Custom handcrafted SPAM edge case issue created by Chad. SEO/Promotional link spam disguised with CLI terminology. Note: Issue IDs 1-99 are custom made by Chad for benchmark testing.
